name: get_events
description: Retrieve calendar events by ID, date range, or keyword query. If event_id is provided, returns that single event. Otherwise filters by date range and/or query.

event_id.description: The unique ID of a specific event to retrieve. If provided, other filters are ignored.

start_date.description: Start date for the query range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

end_date.description: End date for the query range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 7 days from start.

query.description: Optional keyword to filter events by title or description.

name: create_event
description: Create a new calendar event with a title, start/end time, and optional details.

attendees.description: Optional list of attendee email addresses.

name: update_event
description: Update an existing calendar event by its ID. Only provided fields are changed.

event_id.description: The unique ID of the event to update.

start.description: New start date-time in ISO format.

end.description: New end date-time in ISO format.

name: delete_event
description: Delete a calendar event by its ID. This action is irreversible.

event_id.description: The unique ID of the event to delete.

name: invite_participant
description: Send a calendar invitation to a participant for an existing event.

event_id.description: The unique ID of the event.

email.description: Email address of the participant to invite.

message.description: Optional message to include with the invitation.

name: check_availability
description: Check whether a person is available during a given time slot by looking at their calendar.

email.description: Email address of the person to check.

start.description: Start date-time of the slot to check in ISO format.

end.description: End date-time of the slot to check in ISO format.
